name: event-management
description: This is a backend system for Event Management System. The flow of the application goes like: - A user can create an account - Any user can crete their event - A super admin of the platform who will review the events - User that created the event will be the admin of their event  - Another users can register for the event  - Events will have a fixed capacity for guests set by the admin of that event - User who created their event will be able to manage their event - A users who registered for an event will be able to cancel their registration
